name: Minimal Editorial
description: Elegant design utilizing luxury spacing, high-end serif typography, and soft off-white canvas styling.
promptBlock: Style: Minimal Editorial. Background is warm off-white (#faf9f6), text is charcoal (#1a1a1a). Use Georgia or Playfair Display for headings and clean sans-serif (Inter) for body. Border radius is tiny (2px or 0px). Layout relies heavily on generous whitespace, high line heights, and absence of boxes or heavy borders. Sections are separated by soft lines (#e3ded5) and elegant typography grids.
